title: Splash Factorial Math
description: The math in the splash text is wrong, 16 + 51,090,942,171,709,439,980 + 4 = 21!
body:
# 16 + 1 + 4 is not 21!
One of the splash texts says "Java 16 + 1 + 4 = 21!" and this is incorrect. Clearly, there is not a single person at Mojang who can understand math, if Mojang thinks that 21 factorial is only 5 more than 16. This resource pack fixes this gamebreaking bug to make Minecraft playable again by changing the splash text to "Java 16 + 51,090,942,171,709,439,980 + 4 = 21!"

## 16 + 1 is not 17!, either!
From 1.18 to 1.20.4, Minecraft was running on Java 17. As such, the incorrect splash text previously read "Java 16 + 1 = 17!", which is also wrong. Never fear, this resource pack has support for all affected versions, and as such, versions below 1.20.5 change the splash to "Java 16 + 355,687,428,095,984 = 17!"

## Why is this fix necessary?
It should be obvious.
